reviews.review_description:
This game is an exact replica of supermarket manager VR. The only difference is the product your selling. Every other aspect is exactly the same. Personally, I LOVE supermarket manager, I just don't love the few glitches on a few of the products that can make it unplayable if you don't know about it. Honestly, I wish they would have put this effort into making it bigger and better. Added more products and content to it. I would have paid the $8 for that. Back to the actual game I'm leaving the review for...I like it, of course. How could I not. I haven't run into any bugs or anything yet. I just found this, and have bought alot of games with the new sale so I haven't put alot of time into, but I'm definitely looking forward to playing. 
I do have one problem. They've started me off with like 5 million dollars. I don't know if that's for buying in early access, but it kills any kinds of goals. I don't need to earn money to buy upgrades or products. There is no challenge.
